narrative:
Pierce Township J (precinct in Clermont County) has 824 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
